project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with React 19, full music search/discovery app
build_system: bun (bun.lock), also npm/package-lock.json available. Next.js build system.
test_command: No tests configured - use bun run lint for validation
verification_instructions: 1. Run bun run lint - must have zero errors. 2. Run bun run build - must succeed with zero errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No external API keys available. Must use only: iTunes Search API (no key), Apple RSS API (no key), lyrics.ovh (no key), YouTube iframe embeds via search URL (no key), localStorage/IndexedDB for all persistence. Avoid infinite re-render bugs - cache snapshot objects in useSyncExternalStore patterns.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript must pass, ESLint must pass, build must succeed, no unused imports, responsive Tailwind CSS, semantic HTML, accessibility reviewed. Follow App Router architecture, prefer Server Components unless client-side needed.
key_patterns: Components in app/components/ with sub-folders for domains. Contexts use useSyncExternalStore with cached snapshots (FavoritesContext pattern). Services in lib/ directory. API routes in app/api/. Pages use Server Components with client wrappers. Glass design system with 5-level hierarchy. Motion tokens in CSS variables. Dynamic color extraction from artwork. Lucide icons.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - All UI components organized by domain (player/, search/, settings/, favorites/, discover/, album/, ui/). app/api/ - API routes (lyrics, youtube, recommendations, spotify). lib/ - Service modules for data fetching and business logic. types/ - TypeScript declaration files. public/ - Static assets.
